description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pr that triggers on push to branches matching pull-request/[0-9]+. The workflow has concurrent runs grouped by workflow and ref, cancelling in-progress jobs. It consists of a pr-builder job that depends on multiple prerequisite jobs: checks, conda-cpp-build, conda-cpp-tests, conda-python-build, conda-python-tests, docs-build, wheel-build, wheel-tests, and devcontainer. Each job inherits secrets and uses shared workflows from rapidsai with specific parameters.
